currentImprovement.experiment: C1→D-route bypass när C0 candidates finns + Swedish pattern match
currentImprovement.description: När C0 hittar candidates via Swedish patterns OCH C2 visar promise (density score > 0), fortsätt till C2/C3 även om C1 säger likelyJsRendered=true. Idag triggar likelyJsRendered=true D-route och hoppar över extraction helt.
currentImprovement.hypothesis: C1 likelyJsRendered=true är falsk positiv för Swedish municipal/komman sites som kungsbacka.se — de har statiskt HTML men saknar time-tags i rå-HTML pga server-side rendering med datum-widget. C2 broad density scoring (kungsbacka: density=151, score=105) fångar dessa bättre än C1 time-tag check.
currentImprovement.codeChange: In run-dynamic-pool.ts (C1-DIRECT-ROUTING), modify the c1Dsignal condition: remove !!c0?.candidatesFound so the C0→Swedish-pattern bypass fires even when root URL has 0 candidates. Swedish patterns find candidates on subpages, not root.

verificationResult.reason: IMP-002 bypass verified: 2/6 sources now produce events (16 total). borlange-kommun=10 events (strong verdict, C2=145), kungsbacka=6 events (weak verdict, C2=105). No regressions.

regressionResult.netAssessment: malm-opera stable at 4 events, blekholmen/boplanet/chalmers/mittuniversitetet unchanged at 0 events
regressionResult.reason: No regressions. IMP-002 bypass doesn't cause regressions on different Swedish site types. malm-opera improved from 0 to 4 events (same as IMP-001 baseline), confirming bypass doesn't break existing behavior.

completedImprovements.experiment: Fixa STEP3-CHAIN bug + hantera orphaned sources
completedImprovements.description: När C0 hittar candidates via Swedish patterns OCH C2 visar promise (density score > 0), fortsätt till C2/C3 även om C1 säger likelyJsRendered=true. Idag triggar likelyJsRendered=true D-route och hoppar över extraction helt.

C2 broad density scoring (kungsbacka: density=151, score=105) fångar dessa bättre än C1 time-tag check.
completedImprovements.codeChange: In run-dynamic-pool.ts, fix the loop termination condition: sources generating rules in round N should NOT be forced to stay in pool when poolRoundNumber would exceed 3. Route them to manual-review instead.
